summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CommunityPulse Nova Rangers scaffold generation. React preview dashboard loads correctly and displays all required sections. All 47 scaffold files exist with proper structure and content.
passed_tests: React preview dashboard loads at frontend URL
All 7 main sections render correctly: header, architecture hero, file tree, tech stack cards, agent pipeline stages, API routes table, models section, env vars terminal
File tree panel shows monorepo structure with 44 expandable tree items
Agent pipeline shows exactly 4 stages: NeedsClassifier, DeduplicationAgent, PriorityRanker, VolunteerMatcher
API routes table shows exactly 18 endpoints with colored method badges (GET/POST/PATCH)
Pydantic models section shows 5 expandable models with field definitions
Environment variables terminal block displays .env.example content correctly
Scaffold file structure exists at /app/communityPulse-nova-rangers/ with all required directories
backend/main.py exists with FastAPI app, CORS, OpenTelemetry, APScheduler setup
backend/models/ has all 5 model files (need.py, volunteer.py, organization.py, assignment.py, submission.py)
backend/routers/ has all 6 router files with proper CRUD operations
agents/pipeline.py has SequentialAgent with 4 LlmAgents and compute_priority_score function
.github/workflows/deploy.yml exists with Cloud Run deployment config
docker/Dockerfile.backend exists with Python 3.12-slim and uv
